name: ICD Coding — Esophageal Cancer + Barrett's + GERD + Acidosis
description: Level 3 — MIMIC hadm 26048429 — 4 diagnoses including oncology sequencing and acid-base
prompt: Patient: Male, 64 years old. Surgical same-day admission. History of long-standing GERD and Barrett's esophagus. Progressive dysphagia, 8 kg weight loss over 3 months. EGD: Barrett's esophagus + mass at distal (lower third) esophagus; biopsy: adenocarcinoma. Labs: Hgb 12.1 g/dL, WBC 11,800, phosphate 1.6 mg/dL, calcium 8.2 mg/dL, magnesium 1.5. ABG: pH 7.27, pCO2 49 mmHg, pO2 76 mmHg — respiratory acidosis with hypoxemia. INR 1.3. Diagnoses: Malignant neoplasm lower third esophagus, Barrett's esophagus, Gastroesophageal reflux disease, Acidosis. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).

codes.description: Malignant neoplasm of lower third of esophagus
